name: devai-aidd-plugin
description: DevAI AIDD Plugin for opencode-based DevAI environments.

scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run release
scripts.test: node scripts/generate-baseline.js && node scripts/build.js && node --check src/index.js && node --check scripts/build.js && node --check scripts/make-release.js && node tests/unit/approval-policy-service.test.js && node tests/unit/build-approval-request.test.js && node tests/unit/build-approval-resolution.test.js && node tests/unit/audit-logger.test.js && node tests/unit/build-question-instruction.test.js && node tests/unit/build-startup-chain-question-instruction.test.js && node tests/unit/opencode-skill-workflow-guard.test.js && node tests/unit/workflow-run-lifecycle.test.js && node tests/regression.test.js && node tests/e2e/scenario-workflow-detection.test.js && node tests/e2e/scenario-readiness-not-initialized.test.js && node tests/e2e/scenario-approval-deny-recovery.test.js && node tests/e2e/scenario-init-chain.test.js && node tests/e2e/scenario-startup-chain-matrix.test.js && node tests/e2e/scenario-startup-run-reentry.test.js
